title.en: Washer Types and Applications Guide: Flat, Spring, Lock Washers
title.zh: 垫圈类型和应用指南：平垫圈、弹簧垫圈、锁紧垫圈

title.hi: वॉशर प्रकार और अनुप्रयोग गाइड: फ्लैट, स्प्रिंग, लॉक वॉशर

description.en: Complete guide to washer types and their applications. Learn when to use flat washers, spring washers, lock washers, and specialized washers for different fastening applications.
description.zh: 垫圈类型及其应用的完整指南。了解何时使用平垫圈、弹簧垫圈、锁紧垫圈和专用垫圈。
description.es: Guía completa de tipos de arandelas y sus aplicaciones. Aprenda cuándo usar arandelas planas, de resorte, de bloqueo y arandelas especializadas.
description.ar: دليل شامل لأنواع الغسالات وتطبيقاتها. تعلم متى تستخدم الغسالات المسطحة ومنظمات الزنبرك وغسالات القفل والغسالات المتخصصة.
description.fr: Guide complet des types de rondelles et leurs applications. Apprenez quand utiliser les rondelles plates, à ressort, de frein et les rondelles spécialisées.
description.pt: Guia completo de tipos de arruelas e suas aplicações. Aprenda quando usar arruelas planas, de mola, de travamento e arruelas especializadas.
description.ru: Полное руководство по типам шайб и их применению. Узнайте, когда использовать плоские, пружинные, гроверные и специальные шайбы.
description.ja: 座金タイプとその応用の完全ガイド。平座金、バネ座金、ロック座金、专用座金の使用時期を学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden zu Unterlegscheiben-Typen und deren Anwendungen. Lernen Sie, wann man Flach, Feder, Sicherungs- und Spezial-Unterlegscheiben verwendet.
description.hi: वॉशर प्रकार और उनके अनुप्रयोगों की पूर्ण गाइड। जानें कि फ्लैट वॉशर, स्प्रिंग वॉशर, लॉक वॉशर और विशेष वॉशर का उपयोग कब करें।

keywords: washer types, flat washers, spring washers, lock washers, fender washers, industrial washers

body.en:
Flat washers (also called plain washers) distribute load and protect surfaces:

DIN 125 / ISO 7089: Standard flat washer, used for load distribution
DIN 126 / ISO 7090: Flat washer with chamfered edges
DIN 1440: Flat washer for clevis pins (rod ends)
DIN 440R: Structural flat washer for wood (large diameter)

Applications:
- Under hex nuts to protect finished surfaces
- Under bolt heads to distribute load on soft materials
- To fill gaps in assembled parts
- To provide bearing surface for bolt heads/nuts

TradeGo stocks comprehensive flat washer range in carbon steel, stainless steel, and various coatings.

Spring washers (also called split lock washers or helical washers) provide spring tension to resist loosening:

DIN 127: Single coil spring lock washer (most common)
DIN 128: Curved spring washer (higher spring rate)
DIN 137: Wave spring washer (for limited space)

How they work:
- The split end digs into both the bearing surface and the nut/bolt
- Spring tension maintains clamping force
- Compensates for settlement and thermal expansion

Important: Split lock washers require hardness differential - they must be harder than the bearing surface to embed properly.

TradeGo spring washers are heat treated to HRC 47-52 for optimal performance.

Lock washers provide more aggressive locking than spring washers:

Star Washers: External teeth lock against the bearing surface
Internal Tooth Washers: Teeth face inward toward the bolt head
Nord-Lock Washers: Wedge-locking principle, pairs of washers with cams

DIN 6797: External tooth lock washer
DIN 6798: Internal tooth lock washer
DIN 6796: Conical spring lock washer (for heavy duty)

For critical applications, consider:
- Nord-Lock washers: Maintains clamping force under extreme vibration
- Tab washers: One-time use, bent tab locks against rotation
- Serrated flange nuts: Integral locking feature

Specialized washers for specific applications:

Fender Washers: Large outside diameter for extra load distribution on thin materials
Construction Washers: For structural steel connections (often called plate washers)
Sealing Washers: Rubber or fiber bonded washers for leak-proof sealing
Insulating Washers: Nylon or fiber for electrical isolation
Micro Washers: Precision washers for electronics and instruments

TradeGo manufactures specialty washers to custom specifications for industrial applications.

cta.ja: 座金のお見積もりを依頼
